---
title: "**School desegregation policies in the city of Barcelona**"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
body-attrs: "class=index-page" # Adds a class called "index-page" to the body
format:
  html:
    css: index-styles.css
---

![](images/Desegpol_logo_transparent%202.png){fig-align="center"}

::: {style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start;"}
<img src="images/geps-logo.png" style="margin-right: 10px;"/> <img src="images/logotip-versio-5-verd-1401x564.png" width="400" height="163" style="margin-right: 10px;"/>
:::

**Funded by:**

![](images/Llimes-signes.png)
